expectations.note: B-foreign header-only wrap (out_headers_only, JSON_BuildTests=OFF): no Bazel-wired test target exists for the cmake() wrapper. The project's own GoogleTest suite lives under tests/ and is driven by CMake/ctest, not exposed as a Bazel test rule by this approach. Honest cap is tier-3 (foreign target builds and installs headers). Tier-4 is informational only and must not be counted as a native-suite pass.
